Part.Source: Event Start loadwwpContext.Call(&WwpContext) AtualizaComissao.Call(&parEmpCod) &loadPesCod = &parPesCod &EmpCod = &parEmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid1_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid1.InternalName) Grid1.Rows = 0 GridsdtComissaoFaturamento.Rows = 0 GridsdtComissaoVendedor_Items.Rows = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &gridCopiar.Title = 'Copiar' &grideditar.Title = 'Editar' &Remover.Title = 'Deleta' do 'loadPessoa' do 'mostrarOcultar' EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TipoComissao.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridLctPagCom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid1.Load For each ORder EmpCod, PesCod, ComLctCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PesCod if PesTipCom.IsEmpty() or PesTipCom.IsNull() Else &TipoComissao = PesTipCom Endif &gridLctCod = ComLctCod &gridPesCod = PesCod &gridLctNom = trim(str(ComLctCod)) + ' - ' + trim(ComLctNom) &gridLctTip = ComLctTip &gridLctGerFin = ComLctGerFin &gridLctPagCom = ComLctPagCom /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &grideditar = !'' &gridCopiar = !'' &DetailWebComponent = !'' &Remover = !'' Do Case Case &TipoComissao.ToString().Trim() = !"N" &TipoComissao.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case &TipoComissao.ToString().Trim() = !"S" &TipoComissao.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case &TipoComissao.ToString().Trim() = !"D" &TipoComissao.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise &TipoComissao.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case &gridLctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao &gridLctPagCom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case &gridLctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Sim &gridLctPagCom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Otherwise &gridLctPagCom.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Load EndFor EndEvent Event GridsdtComissaoFaturamento.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &RemoveFat.FromImage(ico_error) &RemoveFat.TooltipText = "" /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.Item.CurrentItem.Sts = 'S' &RemoveFat.ColumnClass = !'WWActionColumn' &ColumnClass= !'WWColumn' &RemoveFat.FromImage(ico_error) &UmZero = 1 else &RemoveFat.ColumnClass = !'WWActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughFirstColumn' &ColumnClass= !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &RemoveFat.FromImage(UndeleteRow) &UmZero = 0 EndIf sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento_Item__ComTabNor.ColumnClass = &ColumnClass sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento_Item__ComTabPrm.ColumnClass = &ColumnClass sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento_Item__ComValorFat.ColumnClass = &ColumnClass sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento_Item__ComTabNor.Enabled = &UmZero sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento_Item__ComTabPrm.Enabled = &UmZero sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento_Item__ComValorFat.Enabled = &UmZero EndEvent Event GridsdtComissaoVendedor_Items.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &RemoveDesc.FromImage(ico_error) &RemoveDesc.TooltipText = "" /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.CurrentItem.Sts = 'S' &RemoveDesc.ColumnClass = !'WWActionColumn' &ColumnClass= !'WWColumn' &RemoveDesc.FromImage(ico_error) &UmZero = 1 else &RemoveDesc.ColumnClass = !'WWActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughFirstColumn' &ColumnClass= !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &RemoveDesc.FromImage(UndeleteRow) &UmZero = 0 EndIf sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComDscTabCod.ColumnClass = &ColumnClass sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComDscTabColCod.ColumnClass = &ColumnClass sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComPer.ColumnClass = &ColumnClass sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComTabNor.ColumnClass = &ColumnClass sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComTabPrm.ColumnClass = &ColumnClass sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComDscTabCod.Enabled = &UmZero sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComDscTabColCod.Enabled = &UmZero sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComPer.Enabled = &UmZero sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComTabNor.Enabled = &UmZero sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto_Item__ComTabPrm.Enabled = &UmZero EndEvent Event &gridCopiar.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ gridCopiar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event gridCopiar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcCopiarComissao.Create(&EmPCod, &gridPesCod, &gridLctCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event gridCopiar_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter do 'gravarComissao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAddComissaoFaturamento' &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto = &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento &AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem = new() &AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem.Sts = 'S' &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.Add(&AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem) &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento = &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAddComissaoDesconto' &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto = &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto &AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem = new() &AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem.Sts = 'S' &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.Add(&AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem) &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto = &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSemFoco' 3 if &loadPesCod <> 0 do 'loadPessoa' refresh if &PesCod <> 0 and &LctCod <> 0 do 'carregaTipolancamento' endIf Endif &LctCod.SetFocus() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoVoltar' WWVendedorComissao.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCopiar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Copiar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Copiar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcCopiarComissao.Create(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &LctCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Copiar_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid1_DWC.Object = wcComsisaoDescontoItens.Create(&EmPCod, &gridPesCod, &gridLctCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'gravarF9' 9 do 'gravarComissao' EndEvent Event &LctCod.ControlValueChanged do 'carregaTipolancamento' &PesTipCom.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &LctCod.IsValid //&loadPesCod = 0 txtAviso.Caption = '' EndEvent Event &PesTipCom.IsValid //&AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.PesTipCom = &PesTipCom do 'mostrarOcultar' // Refresh EndEvent Event &loadPesCod.IsValid &loadPesCod = 0 txtAviso.Caption = '' EndEvent Event &loadPesCod.ControlValueChanged // if &PesCod <> &loadPesCod do 'loadPessoa' // Endif // if &PesCod <> 0 and &LctCod <> 0 do 'carregaTipolancamento' endIf refresh &loadPesCod = 0 &LCtCod.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &grideditar.Click &LctCod = &GridLctCod &loadPesCod = &GridPesCod do 'loadPessoa' do 'carregaTipolancamento' &loadPesCod.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &RemoveFat.Click if &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.Item.CurrentItem.Sts = 'S' &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.Item.CurrentItem.Sts = 'N' else &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.Item.CurrentItem.Sts = 'S' EndIF EndEvent Event &RemoveDesc.Click if &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.CurrentItem.Sts = 'S' &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.CurrentItem.Sts = 'N' else &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.CurrentItem.Sts = 'S' EndIF EndEvent Event &Remover.Click prcDeletaComissoes.Call(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &gridLctCod) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'gravarComissao' Do Case CAse &IsErroLct = true or &LctCod = 0 msg('Informe Tipo Lançamento!') &LctCod.SetFocus() Case &PesCod.IsEmpty() Msg('Informe Pessoa à receber a comissão!') &loadPesCod.SetFocus() Otherwise Do Case Case &PesTipCom = 'D' //Desconto &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.PesTipCom = &PesTipCom prcGravaComissoes.Call(&WwpContext, &EmpCod, &PesCod, &LctCod, &ComTabNor, &ComTabPrm, &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto) Case &PesTipCom = 'S' //FATURAMENTO &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.PesTipCom = &PesTipCom prcGravaComissoes.Call(&WwpContext, &EmpCod, &PesCod, &LctCod, &ComTabNor, &ComTabPrm, &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento) otherwise &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.PesTipCom = &PesTipCom prcGravaComissoes.Call(&WwpContext, &EmpCod, &PesCod, &LctCod, &ComTabNor, &ComTabPrm, &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto) EndCase &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.Item.Clear() &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.Clear() &ComTabNor.SetEmpty() &ComTabPrm.SetEmpty() &loadPesCod = &PesCod do 'loadPessoa' do 'carregaTipolancamento' &loadPesCod = 0 refresh &loadPesCod.SetFocus() txtAviso.Caption = 'Comissão Atualizada com sucesso!' txtAviso.ForeColor = RGB(0,110,0) EndCAse EndSub Sub 'mostrarOcultar' tbDesconto.Visible = (&PesTipCom = 'D' and &LctCod > 0 and &IsErroLct = false) tbFaturamento.Visible = (&PesTipCom = 'S'and &LctCod > 0 and &IsErroLct = false) tbFixo.Visible = (&PesTipCom = 'N'and &LctCod > 0 and &IsErroLct = false) EndSub Sub 'loadPessoa' txtAviso.Caption = '' For Each ORder EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &loadPesCod &PesCod = PesCod &PesRaz = PesRaz Exit When none &PesCod = 0 &PesRaz = 'Pessoa não localizada' &loadPesCod.SetFocus() EndFor EndSub Sub 'carregaTipolancamento' &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.Clear() &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.Item.Clear() &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.Clear() For Each Order EmpCod, LctCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where LctCod = &LctCod &IsErroLct = false &LctNom = LctNom &LctGerFin = LctGerFin &LctPagCom = LctPagCom Exit When None &LctNom = 'TIPO LANCAMENTO NAO LOCALIZADO' &IsErroLct = true EndFor prcCarregaDadosComissao.Call(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &LctCod, &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto) &Mensagem = &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.ToJson() &PesTipCom = &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.PesTipCom Do Case CAse &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.PesTipCom = 'S' //faturament &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.FromJson(&Mensagem) CAse &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.PesTipCom = 'N' //fixa for &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDescontoItem in &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item &ComTabNor = &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDescontoItem.ComTabNor &ComTabPrm = &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDescontoItem.ComTabPrm Exit EndFor CAse &AuxSdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.PesTipCom = 'D' //desconto &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.FromJson(&Mensagem) EndCase &AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem = new() &AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem.Sts = 'S' &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.Add(&AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem) &sdtComissaoVendedorDesconto.Item.Add(&AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem) &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.Item.Add(&AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem) &sdtComissaoVendedorFauramento.Item.Add(&AuxsdtComissaoVendedorItem) do 'mostrarOcultar' EndSub
